changes: Agent browser tools now expose Playwright only when the user has an existing configured Playwright bridge installed
Fixed the Claude connector setup guidance bubble so its arrow points directly at the Add button instead of below the modal
Added a dismissible instruction card when Claude connector setup needs Screen Recording, so System Settings no longer opens with no explanation
Claude connector setup now actually requests Screen Recording, so Omi shows up in the Screen & System Audio Recording list with a toggle to flip on instead of an empty Settings pane
Polished the Claude setup guidance cards with a frosted glass surface, gradient accent icon, and a cleaner dismiss button
Improved desktop overlay positioning for Claude connector setup and assistant guidance
Tightened the Claude setup guidance card height so short instructions no longer leave excess empty space
Fixed desktop conversations so local transcription sessions are finalized and retried through one durable path
Fixed desktop OAuth setup failures when the backend callback URL is missing
